decisions.name: Production payment and refund provider
decisions.blocker: Alipay sandbox and local reconciliation do not prove production real-funds processing.

decisions.name: Production capacity target
decisions.blocker: No approved production traffic model or production-equivalent 60-minute capacity result.

decisions.name: Final RPO and RTO
decisions.blocker: Local recovery targets are engineering defaults and have not been approved or proven in production.

decisions.name: Compliance retention periods
decisions.blocker: 30/180-day log and audit retention values remain engineering defaults without compliance approval.
